1712320.name: Reverse Module
1712320.description:
An old school RPG about Utopia/Dystopia balance.

Story

We are in a world with two major cities striving for Utopia.

In the first city, called Visthansia, people can have two microchips on them. One of these microchips doesn't allow people to physically hurt other people and the other one calls the police if they're in trouble. These microchips are not mandatory and you get money for having each one on.

Your journey begins when Aelor, a police student in this city, needs to defeat a memories manipulating creature to graduate. She manages to defeat the creature and passes out.

She wakes up in a village that is stuck in an eternal 3 days time cycle where villagers from the Past, Present and Future appears on different days. Her savior, tells Aelor that she has been infected with a deadly disease where a person presents a mark somewhere on their body and another person presents the exact same mark somewhere on their body as well. The two people have to meet and install a Reverse Module or they will die. Will you help Aelor find her Pair?

Gameplay

Fight battles to level up, explore, talk to NPCs and check the environment to learn more about the world of the game. This is an old school RPG through and through.

categories.description: 无需应对快速反应事件
